metadata.title: SubCodeCo | Precision Engineering for Your Vision
metadata.description: SubCodeCo architects bespoke software solutions for enterprises that need scalable, secure, and modern digital products.
metadata.keywords: custom software development, enterprise software, product engineering, web applications, mobile applications, Saudi Arabia

hero.badge: Ready for your next software project
hero.title: Turn your idea into a successful system
hero.description: Whether you're a startup, enterprise, or entrepreneur, we're ready to build custom software solutions tailored to your needs and help you grow.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us?
whyChooseUs.description: We believe every successful project starts with understanding the client's needs, so we work as a technical partner accompanying you from idea to launch and ongoing development.

items.title: Practical Experience
items.description: We have delivered software solutions across multiple industries, giving us the ability to build systems that fit diverse business needs.

items.title: Custom Solutions
items.description: We don't rely on ready-made templates; we design and develop systems aligned with your project's goals and workflow.

items.title: Quality & Performance
items.description: We write clean, scalable code with a focus on performance, security, and maintainability.

items.title: On-Time Delivery
items.description: We follow a clear implementation plan and defined timeline to ensure the project is delivered on schedule.

items.title: Modern Technologies
items.description: We use the latest technologies and best practices to build fast, stable, and scalable systems.

items.title: Ongoing Support & Development
items.description: Our role doesn't end at launch; we provide technical support and updates to ensure continued success.

items.title: Communication & Transparency
items.description: We provide continuous follow-up and clear reports on implementation stages, with direct communication throughout the project.

items.title: Long-Term Partner
items.description: Our goal isn't just to deliver one project, but to build a long-term relationship that helps you grow your business and achieve digital growth.

work.title: Our Work
work.description: Delivering scalable software solutions across industries.

items.title: FinTech Platform
items.description: A secure, high-throughput transaction processing engine for a leading regional bank.

items.title: Healthcare CRM
items.description: HIPAA-compliant patient engagement system streamlining administrative workflows.

items.title: Logistics Dashboard
items.description: Real-time supply chain visibility tool with predictive analytics capabilities.

plans.title: Clear, Flexible Engineering Packages
plans.description: Engagement models tailored to project complexity and required velocity.

items.name: Growth Package
items.featuresIntro: Includes everything in the Launch Package, plus:

items.name: Enterprise Package

testimonials.title: Client Success Stories
testimonials.description: Hear from organizations that have transformed with our software solutions.

items.quote: SubCodeCo did not just build software; they built a resilient foundation for our next stage of growth.
items.name: Omar Al-Harbi

items.quote: The scalable architecture they designed for us reduced operational friction and gave our team confidence to expand faster.
items.name: Lina Al-Salem

items.quote: Exceptional support post-launch. Their team acts like an extension of our business, not just an external vendor.
items.name: Yousef Al-Qahtani

contact.title: Ready to Start Your Project?

finalCta.title: Build Your Next Digital Product With Confidence
finalCta.description: Partner with a team focused on robust engineering, measurable business outcomes, and long-term technical reliability.

SoftwareLanding.heroTitle: Transform Your Idea Into a Custom Software or App with Subcode
SoftwareLanding.heroSubtitle: We design and develop custom websites, mobile applications, and management systems using the latest technologies to grow your business securely.
SoftwareLanding.whyTitle: Why Choose Subcode for Your Software Development?
SoftwareLanding.whySubtitle: We do not sell templates. We craft unique, custom software solutions designed specifically to fit your business size and vision.
SoftwareLanding.advantage1Desc: We build your system from scratch to match your workflow and requirements without limitations.
SoftwareLanding.advantage2Desc: A team of software engineers, UI/UX designers, and project managers working together to deliver top quality.
SoftwareLanding.advantage3Desc: We rely on modern cloud infrastructure that ensures maximum data protection and fast performance.
SoftwareLanding.advantage4Desc: Dedicated post-launch support for continuous updates, security patches, and zero-downtime operations.
SoftwareLanding.portfolioTitle: Featured Projects We Built With Pride
SoftwareLanding.portfolioSubtitle: Explore some of the applications and platforms we have engineered for our clients in Saudi Arabia and the region.
SoftwareLanding.priceTitle: Flexible Packages to Fit Your Scale
SoftwareLanding.priceSubtitle: Choose the right package for your budget and project requirements, or request a custom quote.
SoftwareLanding.pack1Desc: Perfect for businesses seeking a professional digital presence.
pack1Features: Responsive design optimized for mobile devices
SoftwareLanding.pack2Desc: Fully functional native or hybrid iOS and Android apps with a custom backend admin panel.
pack2Features: High performance native or hybrid apps
Admin panel to manage users and content
App publishing on App Store and Google Play Store
6 months of technical support and updates
SoftwareLanding.pack3Desc: Design and development of custom management systems to run your operations.
pack3Features: In-depth analysis of your business workflow
Manage inventory, billing, employees, and clients
Advanced reporting, analytics, and KPI dashboards
Integration with payment gateways & SMS APIs
Annual technical support and maintenance contract
SoftwareLanding.review1Text: Excellent experience with Subcode team in developing our internal portal. High level of professionalism and outstanding technical support.
SoftwareLanding.review2Text: The mobile app they developed for us exceeded our expectations in speed and smooth user experience.

MarketingLanding.heroTitle: Double Your Sales & Achieve Real ROI on Your Ad Campaigns
MarketingLanding.heroSubtitle: Comprehensive marketing strategies, professional ad campaign management, and SEO to reach your target audience efficiently.
MarketingLanding.whyTitle: How Do We Guarantee Your Marketing Success?
MarketingLanding.whySubtitle: Marketing is not just posting on social media; it's a data-driven strategy designed to generate leads and sales.
MarketingLanding.advantage1Desc: We analyze user behavior to launch highly targeted paid campaigns on Google, Meta, TikTok, and Snapchat.
MarketingLanding.advantage2Desc: We optimize your website or e-commerce store to rank on the first page of Google and drive free search traffic.
MarketingLanding.advantage3Desc: We write compelling ad copy and design creatives that hook customers and drive immediate purchases.
MarketingLanding.advantage4Desc: Regular, clear reports tracking every dollar spent and revenue generated to measure your investment.
MarketingLanding.portfolioSubtitle: See how we helped stores and companies increase brand awareness and double sales.
MarketingLanding.priceTitle: Smart Marketing Plans for Fast Growth
MarketingLanding.priceSubtitle: Packages tailored to cover your social media, ads, and branding requirements with proven results.
MarketingLanding.pack1Desc: Perfect for startups and small businesses establishing an online presence.
pack1Features: Create 8 posts and creatives per month
Setup and launch 1 paid ad campaign
MarketingLanding.pack2Desc: Our most popular package for e-commerce shops and growing businesses.
pack2Features: Create 15 posts and creatives with copy
Full setup & management of Meta and Google Ads
MarketingLanding.pack3Desc: All-in-one digital marketing management for large enterprises and brands.
pack3Features: Full management of all channels and direct messages
Daily content creation, reels, and TikTok short videos
Unlimited paid ad campaigns across all platforms
Advanced SEO strategy for high ranking in Google
MarketingLanding.review1Text: Our sales increased by 150% after handing over the ad campaigns and social media management to the Subcode team.
MarketingLanding.review2Text: Thanks to the SEO strategy they implemented, we are now ranking #1 for cosmetic dental terms in our area.
